place: Umalas, Kerobokan, North Kuta, Bali, Indonesia
title: Biombo Architects Tropical Villa in Umalas
blurb: An award-winning Biombo Architects villa in tranquil Umalas — three en-suite bedrooms, an integrated indoor pool, a signature aged-wood roof and a diagonal layout that draws the eye straight through to the water, under 2 km from Berawa Beach.
detail:
A modern architectural masterpiece in the tranquil, highly sought-after area of Umalas, this villa captures the essence of luxury tropical living — serene yet convenient, with easy access to Umalas's dining scene and chic cafés, and just under 2 km from Berawa Beach. Crafted by the renowned Biombo Architects, it forms part of an exclusive private compound of three architectural gems.

The villa is a true expression of modern minimalism intertwined with natural beauty. Its open-plan living area flows gracefully toward the pool, and a distinctive diagonal layout enhances openness and fluidity — the clever orientation optimising natural light and offering uninterrupted views from the entrance through to the integrated pool at the home's heart. Three elegant bedrooms each have en-suite bathrooms, with a sunken circular bathtub positioned as a statement feature.

A signature architectural roof of aged wooden tiles gracefully envelops the villa — a hallmark of Biombo's refined aesthetic — while stone finishes and organic textures reflect timeless elegance and sustainability. Refined yet understated, it suits a residence, holiday home or investment alike, in an exclusive compound of only three villas. Offered leasehold to 2051 with the possibility to extend.
